title: draba philippii
intro: Draba philippii, also known as Philippi's draba or Chilean whitlowgrass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Draba philippii include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. Draba philippii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
